stemHtml: At the top of descent, approaching to landing, the Captain starts feeling severe pain in the chest and in the left arm, what should they do?

options.a: Communicate this to the co-pilot, declare an emergency to land as soon as possible and seek for a medical person on board.
options.b: Communicate this to the co-pilot, however continue the flight and see if the situation worsens.
options.c: Do not tell the co-pilot about the pain in order not to stress them.
options.d: Nothing, maybe can be a normal pain that will disappear with time.
